body.p: This article provides information on working with property files for exist applications.

section.title: Introduction
section.p: For most applications it is a good idea to provide settings in a property file. An exist-db-addons library, available in maven central, enables you to do so.

section.title: usage
section.p: Below a setup for exist-db for properties.

section.title: Include exist-db-addons
section.p: Or include a dependency in exist-db's pom.xml:

section.title: use properties in xquery
section.p: load and use properties in your xquery

section.title: optionally mount properties as docker secret
section.pre: secrets: - source: ${APPNAME}.properties target: teidictjson.properties mode: 0444 secrets: fhwbjson.properties: external: true
